mappings.migrationNotes: Import path swap only. Hardcoded colors were refactored to MUI theme tokens internally — no consumer-side changes.
mappings.decisionRationale: Unique canvas sticky-note component with no Astra equivalent. Accepted after theme-token refactoring.

mappings.migrationNotes: Import path swap only. Hardcoded colors were refactored to MUI theme tokens internally — no consumer-side changes.
mappings.decisionRationale: Unique canvas grouping container with no Astra equivalent. Accepted after theme-token refactoring.

breakingChanges.note: Component and props type renamed for clarity

mappings.migrationNotes: Rename component and type references. No prop shape changes — all fields and callbacks remain identical.
mappings.decisionRationale: Unique status-with-actions card pattern. Renamed to distinguish from basic status primitives in Astra.

breakingChanges.note: Component and props type renamed for domain neutrality

mappings.migrationNotes: Rename component and type references. HistoryEntry interface unchanged and re-exported from Astra.
mappings.decisionRationale: Unique version selection pattern with no Astra equivalent. Renamed for domain-neutral reuse.

mappings.migrationNotes: Import path swap only. Component, props, and FileTreeNode interface are unchanged.
mappings.decisionRationale: Unique recursive file-tree component with no Astra equivalent. Already domain-neutral.

mappings.migrationNotes: Import path swap only. Component, props, and LogEntry interface are unchanged.
mappings.decisionRationale: Unique terminal log display with no Astra equivalent. Already domain-neutral.

breakingChanges.note: Build toggle UI inline using { darkMode, toggleDarkMode } from useTheme()

mappings.migrationNotes: Remove local ThemeToggle component. Use Astra's useTheme() hook directly in app shell to build an inline dark/light toggle.
mappings.decisionRationale: Rejected as library component — trivial 10-line wrapper around Astra's own useTheme hook. Belongs in app code.

breakingChanges.new: Generic T with Column<T>[] render functions
breakingChanges.note: Use column render prop: (row) => <Chip label={row.status} color={row.statusColor} />

breakingChanges.new: No built-in selection; add via TableRow onClick in column render
breakingChanges.note: Wrap DataTable or extend consumer with selection state

mappings.migrationNotes: Replace StatusTable with DataTable. Define columns with render functions for status chip display. Manage selection state in container.
mappings.decisionRationale: Rejected as net-new because Astra's DataTable with Column<T> render functions is strictly more flexible.

breakingChanges.note: FileViewerRouter routes by file extension to specialized viewers

mappings.migrationNotes: Map CodeViewer usage to FileViewerRouter. Construct fileName from extension (e.g., 'content.json'). Wrap with custom header Box if headerLabel/headerExtra are needed. YAML/TOML: contribute extension to FileViewerRouter rather than maintaining parallel viewer.
mappings.decisionRationale: Rejected as net-new because Astra's file-viewer infrastructure (FileViewerRouter + JsonViewer + MdViewer) already covers primary use cases.

mappings.migrationNotes: Source code not provided in PR components folder. Keep local until source is resubmitted.
mappings.decisionRationale: Cannot evaluate without source code. Listed in specification but absent from components delivery.
